projectDescription: A smart fiscal management assistant for vacation rental hosts in Costa Rica, automating VAT (IVA 13%) calculations, income tax tracking, compliance deadline alerts, and report generation.
keyFeatures: Automatic IVA (13%) calculation for vacation rental income
Income tax (Impuesto sobre la Renta) calculation and tracking
Compliance deadline alerts and reminders for Costa Rican tax obligations
Automated fiscal report generation for tax filings
CSV import for transaction and income data
Module-based architecture (M1–M5) for organized fiscal management
Git Flow-based development with CI/CD pipeline
Kanban project management via GitHub Projects
publicApiSurface: IVA calculation module (13% VAT on rental income)
GitHub Issues with module labels M1–M5
